title: Post-019 Workstation Migration Readiness Reassessment
objective: Perform the bounded post-publication reassessment that may follow Packet 019, using the published parent-root commit and clean synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror evidence to determine whether the workstation-migration lane remains bounded-trial-ready, needs another bounded trial, or still has blockers, without approving migration, widening scope into services or hosting, or mutating the preserved old clone.
active_role: Olares Post-019 Workstation Migration Readiness Assessor
dependency_note: Packet 019 restored publication hygiene for the Packet 017 host-created artifact through commit `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc` and synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` cleanly to that commit. This packet exists to reassess the workstation-migration lane after two successful bounded host-side documentation/planning trials and the second-trial artifact publication/resync gate, without treating publication hygiene as full migration approval.
required_inputs: A completed Packet 019 handoff recording the bounded publication scope, published commit hash `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc`, and post-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` clean-mirror evidence
The Packet 018 publication-first decision and Packet 017 second-trial execution evidence
The prior workstation-migration readiness ruling in `ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-03-olares-phase-5-011-post-sync-workstation-migration-readiness-reassessment-handoff.md`
The controlling authority-doc restatements in `Infrastructure/Olares_Workspace_Authority_Framework.md` and `Infrastructure/Olares_Build_Guide.md`
constrained_outputs: A dated reassessment handoff deciding whether the workstation-migration lane remains bounded-trial-ready, needs another bounded trial, or still has blockers after Packet 019
A recorded statement of whether `TASK-021`, `TASK-023`, or `TASK-025` need any status change after Packet 019
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Verify that Packet 019 completed with a bounded published parent-root commit and post-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` evidence showing branch, remote, commit `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc`, and cleanliness.
Confirm the synchronized host mirror contains the controlling Packet 017 and Packet 018 authority artifacts and no longer carries the Packet 017 artifact as an untracked file.
Reassess whether the workstation-migration lane is still bounded-trial-ready, now needs another bounded trial, or remains blocked, while keeping migration itself unapproved.
State whether `TASK-021`, `TASK-023`, and `TASK-025` remain unchanged or require narrow status restatement.
Preserve the split decision surfaces: no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, and no host-runtime mutation.

Stop if Packet 019 has not completed cleanly, if repo parity remains ambiguous, or if execution would require migration approval, service changes, auth or ingress changes, force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes reassessment only. It does not authorize database writes, publication execution, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as a bounded post-019 reassessment. Read-only host evidence confirmed `/home/olares/code/apex` on `clean-main` at `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc`, remote `https://github.com/jasonlswenson-sys/RESA-Power-Project-Management.git`, status count `0`, Packet 017 handoff present, Packet 018 handoff present, Packet 019 JSON present, and Packet 019 handoff absent as expected post-publication drift. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with dirty/untracked count `30`. The workstation-migration lane remains bounded-trial-ready but not migration-ready; no runtime, service, auth, ingress, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, remote rewrite, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation was performed or authorized.
next_action: Open only a narrow next packet: `Olares Phase 5 021 - Bounded Non-Runtime Application-Source Host Trial Planning`. That packet should plan one reversible application-source or test-only host-side trial and decide publication/resync handling for local Packet 019 and Packet 020 closure authority before any host-side execution. Do not approve migration, runtime mutation, AI-services work, Gitea/code-hosting work, canonical-hosting changes, remote rewrite, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation.
